meta.title: OT Data Lakes
meta.description: Greg Valentine begins by introducing data lakes as a concept and its usefulness for OT. He shows the key steps and goes over some of the leading data lake service providers. He shows the difference between data warehouses and data lakes, and how data lakes can be used for a variety of security related purposes, such as SIEM and threat intel.
